title: Decision No. 6 of 2025 Amending Decision No. 67 of 2021 Designating Foreign States under Legislative Decree No. 56 of 2018
summary: Updates the designated foreign-state regime that determines where Bahrain’s foreign-party cloud customer-content rules apply.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Amends the list or designation framework for foreign states under the cloud law.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Amends the designated foreign-state list for Bahrain’s cloud law.

notes: Related instruments: Amends Decision No. 67 of 2021
